name: drug_trial_adverse_event_underreport_cedar_point_27
premise: A CRISPR therapy consent form omitted a long-tail risk that emerged in mice after enrollment closed. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around drug trial adverse event underreport cedar point has converged with local pressure in the Underreport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Victor Mensah
agents.identity: I am Victor Mensah, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Advisor Ravi Singh
agents.identity: I am Advisor Ravi Singh, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Victor Mensah must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Victor Mensah do?
